subject: Sports
title: Hamilton vs Verstappen: F1's New War
description: A short lesson to help you apply Hamilton vs Verstappen: F1's New War.

hook.text: The 2021 F1 season came down to the last lap of the last race. One decision changed the champion.

buildup.text: Lewis Hamilton and Max Verstappen traded wins all season. They collided multiple times—each blaming the other.

discovery.text: At Abu Dhabi, a controversial safety car restart gave Verstappen fresh tires for one final lap. He overtook Hamilton and won.

twist.text: The race director's decision was so disputed that he was removed from his position. Hamilton was devastated.

climax.text: It was the most dramatic F1 season in decades—two generations colliding at 200 mph for the ultimate prize.

punchline.text: One lap, one pass, one controversy. F1's most dramatic finish ever.

quiz.question: Why was the 2021 Abu Dhabi F1 finale controversial?
options: A disputed safety car restart gave Verstappen fresh tires for the final lap
Hamilton's car was disqualified after the race
Both drivers crashed on the last lap
